---
title: "Structure-based drug design with equivariant diffusion models"
author: 
- Schneuing
- Harris
- Du
- et al.
publication: "Nat Comput Sci, **4**, 899–909 (2024)"
categories: 
  - external-publication
  - medicinal-chemistry
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1038/s43588-024-00737-x
url_preprint: 
journ: "Nat Comput Sci"
issue: 4
page: 899–909
year: 2024
image: ""
pub_number: 
doi: 10.1038/s43588-024-00737-x
---
